charter: Designing and building the mfz thread sweep and review system: proactive detection of new and changed sessions from cheap source signals, baseline and quiescence-gate semantics, cheap-model triage of candidate sessions against thread charters, the machine-local verdict ledger (fits/no-fit/pass/reject pinned to session watermarks and charter hashes), and the human review workflow (pending, ingest-as-accept, reject, conclude). Covers the design decisions and their rationale, the thread-sweep OpenSpec change, implementation, and follow-on refinements. Emphasize decisions made, alternatives rejected and why, domain terms coined, and open questions.

sessions.title: OpenSpec skill loading and subagent prompts
